name: salon-shop
description: Automated test tooling for the Royal Braids Salon Shop Firebase website.

scripts.check:js: node --check public/client-config.js && node --check public/JS/splash.js && node --check public/JS/apply-client-config.js && node --check public/JS/theme-preset-preview.js && node --check public/JS/script.js && node --check public/JS/admin.js && node --check scripts/new-client.js && node --check functions/client-config.js && node --check functions/waitlist-action-messages.js && node --check functions/index.js
scripts.test: npm run check:js && npm run test:unit && npm run test:rules && npm run test:e2e && npm --prefix functions test
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-salon-shop-tests "vitest run tests/rules --config vitest.rules.config.js"
